name: Aethon
description: An ISC-leaning world with a backwater reputation and a capital city that has more libraries than landing pads. Aethon was the site of a Compact 'mutual cooperation' treaty that the local militia did not hold. The treaty failed. Aethon didn't. The planet's surface economy is small-scale agriculture and a stubborn tradition of independent scholarship; the orbital port is quiet, run by a port authority that asks fewer questions than the larger systems, and is known as the kind of place a crew on the run can disappear into for a season.
